explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: A case study highlights a disciplined approach to AI deployment. This approach includes tracking AI tool value and collecting feedback, which demonstrates operational governance and accountability.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: This Deloitte Tech Trends 2025 case study provides evidence for **governance**, **oversight**, and **transparency**. The case study highlights Graybar's disciplined approach to AI deployment, including tracking AI tool value and collecting feedback, which demonstrates operational governance and accountability. It also mentions specific AI use cases and human review before customer delivery, indicating operational execution and oversight, and discusses piloting AI use cases to demonstrate trustworthiness, aligning with transparency.
relevant_sources.title: Graybar Takes a Rigorous Approach to Demonstrating Generative AI Value

oversight.findings: A case study mentions specific AI use cases. It also references human review before customer delivery, indicating operational execution and oversight.
oversight.path_to_improvement: Publish override mechanisms, escalation processes, or appeal workflows.

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.path_to_improvement: Publish detailed documentation (model cards, system specs) for AI systems deployed.

summary.overall_findings: Drawing from 5 publicly available sources, Graybar Electric's published materials address 3 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars. Evidence for transparency includes a case study discussing piloting AI use cases to demonstrate trustworthiness, while oversight materials mention human review before customer delivery. Furthermore, governance disclosures highlight a disciplined approach to AI deployment and describe tracking AI tool value. No qualifying public evidence was found for fairness, explainability, and 2 additional pillars.
